pi_items.source: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer in Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Genre in Chinook database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee in Chinook database shows 8 total employees. Only 3 employees (Jane Peacock, Margaret Park, Steve Johnson) are assigned as customer support representatives (have customers). The metadata appears to conflate total employee count (8) with filtered count of employees with customers (3).
This is a task configuration value, not a factual claim about data
This is a task configuration value, not a factual claim about data
This is a task configuration value, not a factual claim about data

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. It contains 59 customers, 25 genres, and 8 total employees. The metadata claim of 3 employees is contradicted by the actual database which contains 8 employee records. The 3 likely refers to the count of employees who support customers (Jane Peacock, Margaret Park, and Steve Johnson), which would be the expected row count for the v_employee_sales_summary view after filtering, but the metadata field is mislabeled as 'ground_truth' about the database itself rather than about the views.
